description_long: This is a modern electronic keyboard with a sleek, rectangular body finished in black and white. The keyboard features a full set of piano-style keys, with alternating black and white keys spanning the length of the instrument. Above the keys, there is a control panel with a digital display, several buttons, and sliders, likely for adjusting sound settings, instrument voices, and effects. The display is illuminated in blue, making it stand out against the dark surface. The keyboard appears to be constructed from plastic with a matte finish, and the control panel area is slightly recessed. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for use in urban environments such as street performances, music studios, or community centers.
description: A sleek, black and white electronic keyboard with a full set of piano keys and a blue-lit digital control panel. The design is modern, compact, and portable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the keyboard, all keys, and the central control panel with a blue display.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the keyboard and the raised control panel area.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back edge of the keyboard, with the control panel and display less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the depth and the control panel from a different perspective.
